options.panelConfig:
---
anchors:
  thresholds-operstate: &thresholds-operstate
    - color: "#FF3154" # red
      level: 0
    - color: "#4BDD33" # green
      level: 1
  thresholds-traffic: &thresholds-traffic
    - color: "#bec8d2" # grey
      level: 0
    - color: "#4BDD33" # green
      level: 199999
    - color: "#FFFF00" # yellow
      level: 500000
    - color: "#FF8000" # orange
      level: 1000000
    - color: "#FF3154" # red
      level: 5000000
  label-config: &label-config
    separator: replace
    units: bps
    decimalPoints: 1
    valueMappings:
      - valueMax: 100000000000
        text: ​
cellIdPreamble: cell-
cells:
  clab-srexperts-agg1:ethernet-1/1:clab-srexperts-bngblaster:eth1:

      thresholds: *thresholds-operstate
  link_id:clab-srexperts-agg1:ethernet-1/1:clab-srexperts-bngblaster:eth1:
    dataRef: clab-srexperts-agg1:ethernet-1/1:out
